description: A photograph depicting a dry grassland habitat with scattered shrubs and trees on the Franconian Alb, Germany. The foreground shows green grass with clumps of rush-like vegetation. The mid-ground features a band of denser, drier-looking grassland or heathland, including what is identified in the surrounding context as juniper heathland. The background consists of a dense coniferous forest plantation stretching across rolling hills under a bright, overcast sky. The image credit is M. Probeck.
